title: The Rambam: Doctor, Philosopher, and Judaism's Greatest Codifier
title_zh: 拉姆班:医生、哲学家与犹太教最伟大的法典编纂者
title_he: הרמב"ם: רופא, פילוסוף ומקודד הגדול ביותר של היהדות

key_figures.name: Rabbi Moshe ben Maimon (Rambam/Maimonides)
key_figures.role: Subject of article - codifier, philosopher, physician

key_figures.name: Sultan Saladin
key_figures.role: Muslim leader whom the Rambam served as physician

key_figures.name: Ramban (Nachmanides)
key_figures.role: Later scholar who debated Rambam's philosophical approach

cultural_parallels: Neo-Confucian integration of Buddhist and Daoist concepts during Song Dynasty
Chinese legal codification comparable to Mishneh Torah
Traditional Chinese medicine's holistic approach paralleling Rambam's medical philosophy
Confucian scholar-official ideal (士大夫) resembling Rambam's integrated leadership
Zhu Xi (朱熹) as contemporary comprehensive thinker in Chinese tradition
